space_description: This 4.25 acre lot is located on the I-15 freeway in the City of Hesperia situated on a hard corner Mariposa Rd & Verde Rd. it is zoned mixed use commercial. The property features a 2,019 square foot structure currently being used as an administrative office. The structure features 4 private rooms 2 restrooms and a kitchenette. The entire property is fully fenced and easily accessible from the Main St Exit in Hesperia. This prime location has great visibility with tons of exposure offering ample opportunity!
